description: This file defines a Spring Data JPA repository interface for managing MFA challenge entities, enabling database operations related to MFA challenges.

classes.name: MfaChallengeRepository
classes.description: A repository interface for managing MFA challenge entities, providing custom query method to retrieve the latest challenge that is not yet consumed and not expired.

methods.name: findFirstByUserIdAndConsumedAtIsNullAndExpiresAtAfterOrderByCreatedAtDesc
methods.description: Fetches the most recent MFA challenge for a user that has not been consumed and has not expired.
